Notice Of Motion And Motion For Payment Of Attorneys Fees And Reimbursement Of Costs And Expenses
Off Calendar Jan-10-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. JOHN P. MYERS, Esq. of Bickel Sannipoli APC (Tel: 619-374-4100) for plaintiff;
Atty. JON D. UNIVERSAL, Esq. of Universal & Shannon, LLP (Tel: 916-780-4050) for defendant FCA US LLC.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF BRYAN VESTAL's Motion For Payment Of Attorney's Fees And Reimbursement Of Costs And Expenses.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court takes the matter under submission.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, Email: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/RBU)

***** After the hearing, the court signs an order granting in part plaintiff's motion for payment of attorney's fees and reimbursement of costs and expenses. (See signed order for complete ruling.) (302/RBU) *****
